question: According to wikipedia, how many Asian countries still have a monarchy and access to the sea in 2021?

11. **Saudi Arabia** - An absolute monarchy where the king holds vast powers.

[{'type': 'text', 'text': 'Thought: Now that I have both lists—countries in Asia with monarchies and those with access to the sea—I will find the intersection of these two lists to determine which countries have both characteristics. The lists are as follows: **Countries with Monarchy:** 1. Bahrain 2. Bhutan 3. Brunei 4. Cambodia 5. Japan 6. Jordan 7. Kuwait 8. Malaysia 9. Oman 10. Qatar 11. Saudi Arabia 12. Thailand 13. United Arab Emirates **Countries with Coastlines:** 1. Afghanistan 2. Armenia 3. Azerbaijan 4. Bahrain 5. Bangladesh 6. Brunei 7. Cambodia 8. China 9. Cyprus 10. Georgia 11. India 12. Indonesia 13. Iran 14. Iraq 15. Israel 16. Japan 17. Jordan 18. Kazakhstan 19. Kuwait 20. Lebanon 21. Malaysia 22. Maldives 23. Myanmar 24. Philippines 25. Qatar 26. Russia 27. Saudi Arabia 28. Singapore 29. South Korea 30. Sri Lanka 31. Syria 32. Taiwan 33. Thailand 34. Turkey 35. United Arab Emirates 36. Vietnam 37. Yemen I will now compute the intersection of these lists and count how many countries fall into both categories. monarchy_countries = [ "Bahrain", "Bhutan", "Brunei", "Cambodia", "Japan", "Jordan", "Kuwait", "Malaysia", "Oman", "Qatar", "Saudi Arabia", "Thailand", "United Arab Emirates" ] coastline_countries = [ "Afghanistan", "Armenia", "Azerbaijan", "Bahrain", "Bangladesh", "Brunei", "Cambodia", "China", "Cyprus", "Georgia", "India", "Indonesia", "Iran", "Iraq", "Israel", "Japan", "Jordan", "Kazakhstan", "Kuwait", "Lebanon", "Malaysia", "Maldives", "Myanmar", "Philippines", "Qatar", "Russia", "Saudi Arabia", "Singapore", "South Korea", "Sri Lanka", "Syria", "Taiwan", "Thailand", "Turkey", "United Arab Emirates", "Vietnam", "Yemen" ] # Find intersection monarchy_and_coastline = set(monarchy_countries).intersection(set(coastline_countries)) # Count the number of countries that are both number_of_countries = len(monarchy_and_coastline) print(number_of_countries) '}]
